channel.title: GitHub Less Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Less in GitHub

item.title: Tencent/weui
item.description: A UI library by WeChat official design team, includes the most useful widgets/modules in mobile web applications.

item.title: Tencent/weui-wxss
item.description: A UI library by WeChat official design team, includes the most useful widgets/modules.

item.title: jerrykuku/luci-theme-argon
item.description: Argon is a clean HTML5 theme for OpenWrt LuCI. Users may setup their own favorite logins, including beautiful pics and customized mp4 videos.

item.title: TalkingData/iview-weapp
item.description: 一套高质量的微信小程序 UI 组件库

item.title: ng-alain/ng-alain
item.description: NG-ZORRO admin panel front-end framework (surge mirror https://ng-alain-doc.surge.sh)

item.title: hsl947/react-antd-multi-tabs-admin
item.description: ts+react+antd-多页签后台模板(纯净版，非 antd pro！)
